config_options.label: Note
config_options.description: You may need to refresh the page after saving for changes to take effect.

config_options.label: Allow Notifications
config_options.name: browser_allow_browser
config_options.description: Click to allow browser notifications. You must click this button for each browser.

config_options.label: Auto Hide Delay
config_options.name: browser_auto_hide_delay
config_options.description: Set the number of seconds for the notification to remain visible. Set 0 to disable auto hiding. (Note: Some browsers have a maximum time limit.)

on_extdown.subject: Tautulli ({server_name})
on_extdown.body: The Plex Media Server remote access is down. ({remote_access_reason})

on_intdown.subject: Tautulli ({server_name})
on_intdown.body: The Plex Media Server is down.

on_extup.subject: Tautulli ({server_name})
on_extup.body: The Plex Media Server remote access is back up.

on_intup.subject: Tautulli ({server_name})
on_intup.body: The Plex Media Server is back up.

on_pmsupdate.subject: Tautulli ({server_name})
on_pmsupdate.body: An update is available for the Plex Media Server (version {update_version}).

on_newdevice.subject: Tautulli ({server_name})
on_newdevice.body: {user} is streaming from a new device: {player}.

on_plexpyupdate.subject: Tautulli ({server_name})
on_plexpyupdate.body: An update is available for Tautulli (version {tautulli_update_version}).

on_plexpydbcorrupt.subject: Tautulli ({server_name})
on_plexpydbcorrupt.body: Tautulli database corruption detected. Automatic cleanup of database backups is suspended.

on_error.subject: Tautulli ({server_name})
on_error.body: {user} ({player}) encountered an error trying to play {title}.

on_intro.subject: Tautulli ({server_name})
on_intro.body: {user} ({player}) has reached an intro marker for {title}.

on_credits.subject: Tautulli ({server_name})
on_credits.body: {user} ({player}) has reached a credits marker for {title}.

on_commercial.subject: Tautulli ({server_name})
on_commercial.body: {user} ({player}) has reached a commercial marker for {title}.

on_tokenexpired.subject: Tautulli ({server_name})
on_tokenexpired.body: The Tautulli Plex account token has expired.
